actions.rationale: Add compute leader, CUDA moat, fwd growth
Software leader, thesis intact, hold thru vol
AI ad-tech growth intact despite drawdown
Power bottleneck leader, hold core position

summary: Trimmed BE from 41% to 18% (concentration risk), redeployed into NVDA (compute leader, 19%) and initiated MRVL (optical/networking bottleneck, 8.5%). Cash at 16.8%, all positions under 20% cap. Portfolio aligned with AI bottleneck migration: power 28%, compute 19%, networking 9%, software 27%.
strongest_bear_case: BE power contracts could slip if data center build-outs slow; NVDA faces margin pressure from custom ASIC competition (AMZN/GOOGL in-house silicon); PLTR government revenue lumpy; APP cyclical; MRVL hyperscaler customer concentration risk.
